why: Use the Peterson Academy planning lectures for explicit vision and implementation; use Beyond Order for chosen burden, sacrifice, and mature vocation framing.
Use 12 Rules for immediate first-order repair; use Faith in Tragedy when shame is fused with suffering and bitterness.
Use Fear as a Catalyst to frame the avoided price and frontier; use Beyond Order for rebuilding through burden and anti-resentment.
Use The Walled Garden for precise complaint and truthful narration; use Beyond Order for negotiation, reciprocity, and resentment repair.
Use Desire and Discipline for schedule, reward, and repeatable structure; use 12 Rules for blunt local-order grounding.
Use The Walled Garden for truthful narration and emergence of the actual point; use 12 Rules for first-order truth discipline.
